issues.claim: Analog does not contradict traditional meaning
issues.objection: 4.32 engineering layer stays within the convergent reading of all four traditions cited. No claim in the engineering body would force a Shankara-, Ramanuja-, Madhva-, or Sridhara-aligned reader to disagree with the operational shadow. The doctrinal moves of the verse are tracked, not flattened.

notes: Distortion test for 4.32: cross-check the engineering analog against the four-tradition source-pack. Engineering body is consistent with the convergent floor; STRETCHED tagged where any tradition's full reach exceeds the operational shadow. PASS.
